fields.label: Slot Name
fields.description: Display name for this slot (e.g., 'Main Product', 'Accessory 1')

fields.label: Slot Code
fields.description: Unique identifier within the bundle for programmatic access

fields.label: Product
fields.description: Fixed product for static slots, default product for configurable slots

fields.label: Product Master
fields.description: Link to Product Master (alternative to Product Variant)

fields.label: Is Required
fields.description: If checked, this slot must be filled for the bundle to be valid

fields.label: Is Configurable
fields.description: If checked, customer can choose a different product for this slot

fields.label: Allow Quantity Change
fields.description: If checked, customer can adjust quantity within min/max limits

fields.label: Minimum Quantity
fields.description: Minimum quantity allowed for this slot

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Display order in the bundle (lower numbers first)

fields.label: Price Modifier Type
fields.description: How the price modifier is applied

fields.label: Price Modifier
fields.description: Amount to add/subtract from component price (negative for discount)

fields.label: Allowed Category
fields.description: Restrict configurable slot to products from this category

fields.label: Allowed Product Type
fields.description: Restrict configurable slot to products of this type

fields.label: Allowed Brand
fields.description: Restrict configurable slot to products from this brand

fields.label: Filter Expression
fields.description: Custom filter expression for allowed products (JSON format)

fields.label: Depends On Slot
fields.description: Slot code this slot depends on (only available if that slot is filled)

fields.label: Excluded With Slot
fields.description: Slot code this slot is mutually exclusive with
